promises.promise_text: Cancel up to $50,000 in student loan debt for borrowers earning under $125,000
promises.evidence: Introduced S.910 (Student Loan Relief Act) in the 119th Congress. Bill is in committee.

promises.promise_text: Implement a 2% wealth tax on fortunes over $50 million
promises.evidence: No wealth tax legislation introduced in the 119th Congress so far.

promises.promise_text: Break up big tech companies like Amazon, Google, and Facebook
promises.evidence: Co-sponsored the AI Accountability Act (S.555) which creates FTC oversight. Partial progress toward tech regulation.

promises.promise_text: Pass universal childcare for families earning up to 200% of poverty level
promises.evidence: Co-sponsored the Childcare for Working Families Act (HR.4321). Bill introduced but in committee.

promises.promise_text: Secure the southern border and finish the border wall
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Secure Border Act (HR.5678). Bill passed Senate committee.

promises.promise_text: Protect Second Amendment rights and oppose any new gun restrictions
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Community Safety Act (S.1776) which preempts state assault weapon bans while strengthening background checks. Consistent opposition to gun control amendments.

promises.promise_text: Cut taxes for working families and simplify the tax code
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Small Biz Tax Relief Act (S.2222) which makes QBI deduction permanent and simplifies small business filing.

promises.promise_text: Repeal the Affordable Care Act and replace with market-based solutions
promises.evidence: No ACA repeal legislation introduced in the 119th Congress. Voted against the Affordable Insulin Now Act which could have been an alternative market approach.

promises.promise_text: Oppose government regulation of artificial intelligence
promises.evidence: Voted No on the AI Accountability Act (S.555), opposing new federal AI regulations.

promises.promise_text: Work across party lines to deliver bipartisan solutions
promises.evidence: Co-sponsored bipartisan bills including the Community Safety Act (62-38 vote) and Small Biz Tax Relief Act (71-29 vote). One of the most bipartisan voting records in the Senate.

promises.promise_text: Lower prescription drug costs for Arizona families
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Affordable Insulin Now Act. Previously helped pass the Inflation Reduction Act's Medicare drug negotiation provisions.

promises.promise_text: Invest in Arizona's border communities and comprehensive immigration reform
promises.evidence: Supported elements of the Secure Border Act but pushed for amendments adding a pathway for DACA recipients. Negotiations ongoing.

promises.promise_text: Expand veterans' mental health services and reduce veteran suicide
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Veterans Mental Health Act (HR.7890), which was signed into law. Bill expands VA mental health services by $3.1B.

promises.promise_text: Cap insulin costs at $35 per month for all Americans
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Affordable Insulin Now Act (HR.1234). Bill passed the House 232-193 and is now in Senate committee.

promises.promise_text: Invest in clean energy jobs for Arizona communities
promises.evidence: Co-sponsored the Clean Energy Jobs Act (HR.3456). Bill is in committee, specifically targets Arizona with Navajo County solar transition funding.

promises.promise_text: Make housing affordable for working families in Arizona
promises.evidence: Co-sponsored the Housing Affordability Act (HR.9999). Bill would eliminate Maricopa County's Section 8 waitlist within 5 years.

promises.promise_text: Reduce government spending and balance the federal budget
promises.evidence: Voted against several spending bills. Supported the Small Biz Tax Relief Act as a revenue-neutral alternative. No balanced budget amendment introduced.

promises.promise_text: Lower taxes for Arizona families and small businesses
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Small Biz Tax Relief Act. Advocated for permanent extension of individual tax cuts.

promises.promise_text: Support innovation and oppose heavy-handed tech regulation
promises.evidence: Voted against the AI Accountability Act, arguing it would stifle innovation. Supports voluntary industry standards over federal mandates.

promises.promise_text: Strengthen border security and enforce immigration laws
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Secure Border Act (HR.5678). Bill passed House committee, awaiting full floor vote.

promises.promise_text: Lower prescription drug costs and protect healthcare coverage
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Affordable Insulin Now Act. Previously helped pass the Inflation Reduction Act's drug price negotiation provisions.

promises.promise_text: Secure Arizona's border with smart technology and more agents
promises.evidence: Supported border security funding in the Secure Border Act but pushed for technology-focused amendments over physical barriers. Negotiations ongoing.

promises.promise_text: Support veterans and expand access to VA services
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Veterans Mental Health Act (HR.7890). Bill was signed into law, expanding VA mental health services.

promises.promise_text: Invest in clean water infrastructure for Arizona
promises.evidence: No specific clean water infrastructure bill introduced in the 119th Congress. Issue remains a priority per office communications.

promises.promise_text: Make housing more affordable for Arizona families
promises.evidence: Co-sponsored companion measures to the Housing Affordability Act. Full bill is in committee.

promises.promise_text: Secure the border and end illegal immigration
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Secure Border Act (HR.5678). Sponsored additional amendments to strengthen enforcement provisions.

promises.promise_text: Cut federal spending and reduce the national debt
promises.evidence: Voted against several appropriations bills deemed too costly. Proposed spending reduction amendments, some adopted.

promises.promise_text: Protect gun rights and oppose red flag laws
promises.evidence: The Community Safety Act (S.1776) which he voted for includes a federal crisis intervention framework (red flag law), contradicting his promise to oppose all red flag provisions.

promises.promise_text: Oppose all new federal climate regulations and mandates
promises.evidence: Voted No on the Clean Energy Jobs Act (HR.3456). Consistently opposed all climate-related spending bills.

promises.promise_text: Make childcare affordable for working families
promises.evidence: Co-sponsored the Childcare for Working Families Act (HR.4321). Bill is in committee.

promises.promise_text: Invest in Arizona infrastructure and clean energy jobs
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Clean Energy Jobs Act (HR.3456). Actively advocating for Arizona-specific provisions.

promises.promise_text: Lower healthcare costs for Arizona families
promises.evidence: Voted Yes on the Affordable Insulin Now Act (HR.1234). Bill passed the House with his support.
